name: 007n7 - [Pizzaburger!]
description:
[ "I-I'm sorry.. please, I'll pay double..! My son just really wants pizza.." ]

SFW intro! Proxies enabled ANd REQUESTEd!!!

speaking about requesting...

Request me bots!!

yellowie.straw.page


:3

Alright, here's the deal!

You, Elliot, are delivering pizza, as usual. Then, as the customer opens the door... It's a blacklisted customer, and his son, 007n7.

You we're about to leave but then he continues to explain himself, 'I'll pay double!' 'Please, my son really just wants pizza!' he says. What will you do ??

Yes it's based off that one comic.

Personally, I would go for the tsundere Elliot :winkwink: just like in the comic

but, you do you and dont you worry, we're ALL freaks here 😝!

This is before the events of Forsaken! So only 007n7 and C00lkidd are described.

Enjoy :P
creator: Yellowie_
